Uses of Class
com.irurueta.units.UnknownUnitException

      Methods in com.irurueta.units that throw UnknownUnitException 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      (package private) M MeasureFormatter.internalParse​(java.lang.String source, M measure)
      Internal method to parse a string into a measure.
      Acceleration AccelerationFormatter.parse​(java.lang.String source)
      Parses provided string and tries to determine acceleration value and unit.
      Angle AngleFormatter.parse​(java.lang.String source)
      Parses provided string and tries to determine an angle value and unit.
      AngularAcceleration AngularAccelerationFormatter.parse​(java.lang.String source)
      Parses provided string and tries to determine an angular acceleration value and unit.
      AngularSpeed AngularSpeedFormatter.parse​(java.lang.String source)
      Parses provided string and tries to determine an angular speed value and unit.
      Distance DistanceFormatter.parse​(java.lang.String source)
      Parses provided string and tries to determine a distance value and unit.
      Frequency FrequencyFormatter.parse​(java.lang.String source)
      Parses provided string and tries to determine a frequency value and unit.
      MagneticFluxDensity MagneticFluxDensityFormatter.parse​(java.lang.String source)
      Parses provided string and tries to determine a magnetic flux density value and unit.
      abstract M MeasureFormatter.parse​(java.lang.String source)
      Parses a string into a measure.
      Speed SpeedFormatter.parse​(java.lang.String source)
      Parses provided string and tries to determine speed value and unit.

      Parses provided string and tries to determine a surface value and unit.

      Parses provided string and tries to determine a temperature value and unit.
      Time TimeFormatter.parse​(java.lang.String source)
      Parses provided string and tries to determine a time value and unit.
      Volume VolumeFormatter.parse​(java.lang.String source)
      Parses provided string and tries to determine a volume value and unit.
      Weight WeightFormatter.parse​(java.lang.String source)
      Parses provided string and tries to determine a weight value and unit.
      Angle AngleFormatter.parseDegreesAndMinutes​(java.lang.CharSequence source)
      Parses provided string representation using degrees and decimal minutes format.
      Angle AngleFormatter.parseDegreesMinutesAndSeconds​(java.lang.CharSequence source)
      Parses provided string representation using degrees, minutes and decimal seconds format.
      Time TimeFormatter.parseHourMinute​(java.lang.CharSequence source)
      Parses provided string representation using hour and minute format (hh:mm).
      Time TimeFormatter.parseHourMinuteSecond​(java.lang.CharSequence source)
      Parses provided string representation using hour, minute and second format (hh:mm:ss).
      Time TimeFormatter.parseMultiple​(java.lang.CharSequence source)
      Parses a string containing multiple units and returns the summation of all found values as a single Time instance.
